title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
